Harvard Brain Aging Study

About the dataset

Primary description: Preclinical Alzheimer’s aging cohort

The Harvard Brain Aging Study (HABS) is a longitudinal observational study of healthy and pathological aging from cognitively unimpaired participants age 65 and older. MR and PET imaging protocols were designed to be compatible with ADNI. Clinical assessments include demographics, neurocognitive and neuropsychological assessments, blood work, APOE genotyping, and physiological measurements. Data is publicly available via [https://habs.mgh.harvard.edu/researchers/].
Study Harvard Brain Aging Study
Study Website HABS
Data Descriptor Paper https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroimage.2015.03.069
DUA https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn53910452/wiki/626438
Country/Region USA
Disease Tag alzheimers;aging
Age (mean ± SD)
(Baseline) 		73.8 ± 6.2
Age Range
(Baseline) 		51-94
% Female 59.2
CUBIC Project /cbica/projects/Public_Studies
PI for CUBIC Access Approval Christos Davatzikos
N Subjects 289
N MR Sessions 660
Diagnoses

Value V01 V02
CN 286 220
MCI 3 3

(205/660 complete)

/opt/conda/envs/fmriprep/bin/fmriprep \ /cbica/projects/Public_Studies/HABS/Pipelines/HABS_fMRI_2024/Data \ /cbica/projects/Public_Studies/HABS/Pipelines/HABS_fMRI_2024/Protocols \ participant \ --participant_label P0XDCJT \ --fs-license-file /cbica/projects/Public_Studies/HABS/Pipelines/HABS_fMRI_2024/license.txt \ --fs-no-reconall \ --omp-nthreads 2 \ --use-syn-sdc warn \ --output-spaces MNI152NLin2009cAsym:res-2 \ --debug all \ -v
XCP-D (0.7.1rc6)
(76/660 complete)
/cbica/projects/Public_Studies/HABS/Pipelines/HABS_fMRI_2024/Protocols/XCP
/usr/local/miniconda/bin/xcp_d \ /cbica/projects/Public_Studies/HABS/Pipelines/HABS_fMRI_2024/Protocols \ /cbica/projects/Public_Studies/HABS/Pipelines/HABS_fMRI_2024/Protocols/XCP \ participant \ --participant_label P0XDCJT \ --input-type fmriprep \ -p 36P \ --work-dir /cbica/projects/Public_Studies/HABS/Pipelines/HABS_fMRI_2024 \ --motion-filter-type lp \ --band-stop-min 6 \ --motion-filter-order 4 \ --despike \ --fd-thresh 0 \ --lower-bpf 0.01 \ --upper-bpf 0.08 \ --bpf-order 2 \ --head-radius auto \ --dummy-scans auto \ --min-coverage 0.4 \ --smoothing 0 \ --fs-license-file /cbica/projects/Public_Studies/HABS/Pipelines/HABS_fMRI_2024/license.txt
